news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Simplify Introduces the Simplify Kayne Anderson Energy and Infrastructure Credit ETF (KNRG)

overview.description: The Simplify Kayne Anderson Energy and Infrastructure Credit ETF (KNRG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, focusing on fixed income securities issued by energy and infrastructure companies in developed markets. It seeks current income and capital appreciation. KNRG was launched on May 27, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Introduces the Simplify Kayne Anderson Energy and Infrastructure Credit ETF (KNRG)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches KNRG, actively managed ETF seeking attractive yields by investing across credit instruments of energy and infrastructure companies.
